Female: A photo of a male pedestrian.
AgeOver60: A photo of a young or middle-aged pedestrian, not an elderly person.
Age18-60: A photo of a pedestrian who is either a child or an elderly person, not a middle-aged adult.
AgeLess18: A photo of a pedestrian who is clearly an adult, not a child or teenager.
Front: A photo of a pedestrian seen from the side or the back, not facing the camera.
Side: A photo of a pedestrian seen from the front or the back, not from a side profile.
Back: A photo of a pedestrian facing toward the camera, not from the back.
Hat: A photo of a pedestrian who is bareheaded and not wearing any hat or head covering.
Glasses: A photo of a pedestrian who is not wearing glasses or any eyewear on their face.
HandBag: A photo of a pedestrian who is not carrying a handbag or small bag in their hand.
ShoulderBag: A photo of a pedestrian without a shoulder bag or strap over their shoulder.
Backpack: A photo of a pedestrian with a clear back, not wearing or carrying a backpack.
HoldObjectsInFront: A photo of a pedestrian with their hands at their sides, not holding any objects in front of them.
ShortSleeve: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a long-sleeved garment that covers their arms.
LongSleeve: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a short-sleeved or sleeveless garment.
UpperStride: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a solid-colored upper garment without any striped patterns.
UpperLogo: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a plain upper garment without any visible logos or graphics.
UpperPlaid: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a plain upper garment without any plaid or checkered patterns.
UpperSplice: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a solid-colored, single-material upper garment without any spliced colors.
LowerStripe: A photo of a pedestrian wearing solid-colored lower body clothing without stripes.
LowerPattern: A photo of a pedestrian wearing plain, solid-colored lower body clothing without any patterns or prints.
LongCoat: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a short jacket or top that does not extend below the waist.
Trousers: A photo of a pedestrian wearing shorts, a skirt, or a dress instead of full-length trousers.
Shorts: A photo of a pedestrian wearing full-length trousers or pants.
Skirt&Dress: A photo of a pedestrian wearing trousers, pants, or shorts instead of a skirt or dress.
boots: A photo of a pedestrian wearing low-top shoes or sneakers, not boots.
